title: Uncontrolled Resource Consumption – Brute Force Attack
description: The system is vulnerable to brute-force attacks due to a lack of rate limiting and proper input validation, leading to excessive resource consumption and potential service disruption.
attack_vector: An attacker repeatedly attempts to guess passwords or other credentials, overwhelming the system's resources and causing it to become unresponsive.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting on authentication attempts.
Use CAPTCHA or other challenge-response mechanisms.
Monitor system resources for suspicious activity.
